title: Armeriastrum curviflorum

The genus Armeriastrum is native to the southwestern United States, specifically in Arizona, Nevada, and New Mexico. Armeriastrum curviflorum is a perennial plant that typically thrives in dry areas with full sun. It is often found growing in association with other desert flora.
